title: HUM-001 fat data strategy for Hummus v1
options: A — Display fat values despite corruption
B — Suppress fat display in Hummus v1
C — Delay launch until fat values corrected
decision: Option B — Suppress fat_g and saturated_fat_g from hummus frontend JSON. Add disclosure sentence to MethodologyFooter. v2 fat correction scheduled Q3 2026.
notes: See TASK-060 for full evaluation and rationale.

title: Hummus v1 go-live approval
options: Hold until QA warning W-1 is resolved
recommendation: Hold until TASK-073 resolves QA warning W-1 (content spec update), then approve.
decision: Approve go-live. W-1 resolved and final QA passed (TASK-090); Hummus v1 is LIVE.
notes: Gated on TASK-073. W-1 cleared and final QA passed (TASK-090); go-live approved (TASK-096).

title: Bari Launch Definition v1
options: Ratify Launch Definition v1 (5 gen1 categories on v2 + amendments A/B)
recommendation: Ratify (TASK-126). Establishes a fixed, testable launch finish line so P1-P5 cannot creep.
decision: Ratify Launch Definition v1. LAUNCH = Operational Readiness (5 gen1 categories - maadanim, hummus, snacks, yogurts, bread - LIVE on v2, score-frozen, field-complete; methodology page; >=1 flagship article; v2 Phase 1+2; confidence gate passing; validate-corpus green; fresh mobile+lg QA baselines; 0 P0/P1; dashboard GREEN) AND Market-Facing Readiness (comparison pages publicly available + indexable; first flagship article published; 5/5 category coverage; user-feedback collection active; SEO baseline live; analytics active). Amendment A: milk launches LEGACY-labelled (double migration gen0->gen1->v2 is disproportionate for a 20-product non-shelf editorial corpus) with a COMMITTED post-launch migration (P1 sub-task 128E), not optional. Amendment B: Launch Success Indicators (market-facing, section 6.5) added. NOT gating launch: Wave 2, base_pct, BSIP2 next-gen, all 3 articles, milk v2.
notes: Full definition: C:/Bari/launch_definition_v1.md. Roadmap: C:/Bari/bari_objective_roadmap_v1.md. P1-P5 success criteria inherit the launch dimension each objective owns (launch_definition_v1.md section 8).
